title: Corey Burton

'''Corey Burton''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice actor]].

==Biography==
In the late [[1970]]s, Corey Burton first got involved with the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe when he voiced [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] for a 1979 [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] [[Star Wars (book-and-record)|Read-Along book/record]] retelling [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="Corey Burton Interview">{{YouTube|video=ObUMLaF_2Jw|text=Corey Burton Discusses His Journey In The Acting World, Star Wars, Transformers, & Much More!!|channel=@Jantmor|name=Jantmor|quote=Starts discussing Star Wars at 1:12:00|archivedate=20220328095701}}.</ref> A year later, he provided the voice for [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="Corey Burton Interview" /> He again voiced Luke in the audio drama ''[[Rebel Mission to Ord Mantell]]''.<ref name="Rebel to Ord Mantell">''[[Rebel Mission to Ord Mantell]]''</ref>

Years later, Burton returned to the ''Star Wars'' universe to play [[Dooku|Count Dooku / Darth Tyranus]] in various [[LucasArts]] projects due to being considered [[Christopher Lee]]'s "audio double." He also voiced [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]] in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars|2003 micro-series]], [[Ziro Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Ziro]] the [[Hutt]] in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|2008 movie]], [[Cad Bane]] in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|subsequent animated series]], and many different characters in various projects.
